# Copilot Instructions for AutoAnalyst-MA

- Build the project as a modular Python analytics system.
- Keep the first implementation focused on the MVP CSV workflow.
- Prefer small, testable modules over large monolithic files.
- Keep the architecture explainable and easy to extend toward a multi-agent design.
- Use clear names for pipeline stages and data structures.
- Preserve compatibility with FastAPI-based backend development.
- Add tests for core pipeline behavior as features are introduced.
